# tryOnScopeDispose

Safe . Call if it's inside an effect scope lifecycle, if not, do nothing

**Package:** `@vueuse/shared`
**Category:** Component

## Usage

```ts
import { tryOnScopeDispose } from '@vueuse/core'

tryOnScopeDispose(() => {

})
```
